questions: Bollywood er top actors kon kon
answers: Bollywood is the Hindi-language film industry based in Mumbai, India. It's one of the largest film industries in the world, known for colorful musicals, dramatic stories, and iconic dance sequences.
Bollywood holo India er Hindi film industry — Mumbai te based. Song, dance, drama, romance miliye Bollywood movies unique. Shah Rukh Khan, Amitabh Bachchan — Bollywood legends.
Classic Bollywood films include Sholay, DDLJ, Lagaan, 3 Idiots, and Dangal. The industry produces over 1,500 films yearly, making it one of the most prolific in the world.
Bollywood music is popular because it blends Indian classical, folk, and Western styles with catchy melodies. Top actors include Shah Rukh Khan, Aamir Khan, Deepika Padukone, and Alia Bhatt.
